name: Select → Set
description: You can also set an option for the template select from elsewhere in your YAML file with the [`select.set` Action](https://esphome.io/components/select#select-set_action).

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: The ID of the select to set.

config_entries.label: Option
config_entries.description: The option to set the select to.
